author: y4rr
content: [result] Implemented Conv3d, ConvTranspose1d, ConvTranspose3d with full im2col/col2im, autograd backward, groups support, dilation, padding. Conv3d handles 5D tensors [N,C,D,H,W]. ConvTranspose1d delegates to ConvTranspose2d via dimension promotion. All exported from ferrotorch-nn. 109 new tests added, 3380 total pass.
